summary: First-run comprehensive test of SMK26 EventOS PWA. Backend: 24/24 pytest cases passed covering public endpoints, registrations (CRUD + receipt + admin payment), orders (catalog pricing + receipt + admin payment), treasure hunt (submit + leaderboard aggregation), admin stats, CSV exports, and auth (401/injected session). Frontend: all primary flows work — home (hero, CTA, 5-item bottom nav, WhatsApp FAB), 15 sport cards with detail navigation, 3 schedule day tabs, scoreboard refresh, registration form end-to-end (creates REG ID, shows QR + receipt upload), shop modal + order creation (creates ORD, confirmation view), treasure hunt 6 tabs + submission + leaderboard update, results page, /admin redirects to /admin/login when unauth, injected session grants admin dashboard access.

issues: WhatsApp floating FAB overlaps the 'Beli' button on the first product card at 390px width. Playwright force-click still registers, but real-mouse click path is fine; consider adding bottom padding on product grid or moving FAB up on /shop to avoid occlusion.

action_items: (Optional polish) Adjust WhatsApp FAB position or add grid bottom-padding on /shop so it does not overlap product Buy buttons on narrow screens.

(Optional polish) Console warning on TreasureHunt: <span> cannot be a child of <option> — comes from a dev-mode source-map wrapper around option text (dynamic array mapping). Does not affect functionality; ignore in prod build.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: auth_session sets cookie with samesite=none & secure=true — correct for cross-site preview. Good.

server.py: upload_receipt and upload_order_receipt are public (no auth). MVP-acceptable since reg_id/order_id are opaque UUIDs, but consider requiring at least matching phone/IC to prevent receipt tampering by ID guessing.
server.py: PaymentUpdate allows arbitrary notes on order patch but order update_order_payment does not persist notes (only reg does). Minor inconsistency.
ALLOW_ALL_ADMINS=True is documented as MVP mode — must be flipped before launch.
CORS uses '*' with allow_credentials=True which browsers reject; set CORS_ORIGINS to the real domain before prod.
Registrations list & orders list use to_list(5000/5000) — fine for 2000 participants but add pagination once beyond MVP.
test_credentials: Injected admin session — user admin+test@poutrecs.com, session_token=test_session_smk26_2026 (valid 7 days). Written into MongoDB test_database via mongosh per /app/auth_testing.md.
seed_data_creation: Test run created TEST_-prefixed registrations, orders (ORD-9FE8F80B, etc.), treasure-hunt submissions (TEST_Harimau, TEST_Rimau, TEST UI Team). These are visible in admin dashboard and will accumulate across runs; admin can manually clear from Mongo if desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin test session token 'test_session_smk26_2026' is already injected in Mongo (user admin+test@poutrecs.com). Use Authorization: Bearer test_session_smk26_2026 for admin API calls, or set it as 'session_token' cookie for browser tests. Playwright's .click(force=True) on the shop 'Beli' button did NOT trigger React onClick (no modal). Using page.evaluate to call .click() directly DID work. Use JS-dispatch or get_by_role for shop buy buttons to avoid false negatives.
rca of the issue: No unresolved bugs. Only optional polish items noted above.
